leadText: Tomato (Japanese: トマトスライス Tomato Slice) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This very tart ingredient has a lot of savory elements to it, making it popular with many Pokémon.
